name: patterson-design
description: Patterson Companies design-system marketplace: brand core, deck/page/app/docs templates, and website/storefront/tutorial UI kits — each individually installable as a Claude Code plugin with skills, slash commands and subagents.

plugins.name: patterson-brand
plugins.description: Patterson Companies design-system core: brand tokens, fonts, logos, brand imagery, React component library, guideline specimens, and framework adapters (Tailwind v3/v4, UnoCSS, Theme UI, shadcn/ui). Foundation plugin for all Patterson work.

plugins.name: patterson-deck
plugins.description: Patterson 16:9 presentation deck template: cover, section divider, stats, comparison, quote, capabilities table, full-bleed photo band, and closing slides with the wave watermark and official brand imagery. Static HTML — print-to-PDF ready.

plugins.name: patterson-executive-deck
plugins.description: Patterson executive-briefing deck template: editorial navy cover, key takeaways, breakdown matrix, requirements, build outputs, and benefits slides — denser and more formal than the standard deck.

plugins.name: patterson-corporate-page
plugins.description: Patterson corporate web page shell: sticky nav with logo, navy hero, content band, and footer — a React starting point for any on-brand marketing or informational page.

plugins.name: patterson-file-manager
plugins.description: Patterson "Skill Studio" file-manager application shell: navy top bar, sidebar tree, content grid — a React prototype template for internal tools and dashboard-style apps.

plugins.name: patterson-docs
plugins.description: Patterson documentation-site package: a VitePress + Diátaxis styled docs UI kit (sidebar nav, content pages, collections) and a browser-openable docs page template.

plugins.name: patterson-tutorialkit
plugins.description: Patterson theme for TutorialKit (Astro-based interactive tutorials): a runnable starter project with the canonical theme.css, brand logos, a 5-part/18-lesson agent-tooling curriculum, and a static preview page.

plugins.name: patterson-corporate-website
plugins.description: Patterson corporate-website UI kit: interactive recreation of pattersoncompanies.com — home hero, We-Are-Patterson stats, capability tabs, What-We-Do, newsroom, header and footer as separate React screens.

plugins.name: patterson-storefront
plugins.description: Patterson e-commerce storefront UI kit (pattern library v5.7.2 shell), switchable between Dental and Veterinary brands: utility bar, search, category nav + flyouts, hero, featured products, manufacturers, rewards, footer.
